meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve no version control (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: API Integration Guide to Solve Version Control
content.seo_description: Master API integration and eliminate version control chaos. This beginner checklist uses Antigravity and Claude Code to help you ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracking code files. By integrating your API logic with a structured version control workflow using Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform fragile scripts into robust, production-ready assets. This approach automates state management, ensures consistent deployments, and turns your chaotic coding process into a professional, scalable service.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a folder named 'final_v2_real_final' while your client waits for a feature update. You know that one wrong move will break the entire production environment, and the lack of a versioned history is a ticking time bomb. This isn't just a technical hurdle; it’s a bottleneck that kills your reputation as a professional developer.

The relief you seek isn't found in manual backups, but in the seamless integration of versioned API workflows. By leveraging modern AI-native tools, you can move from 'frantic fixing' to 'predictable shipping.' Let’s turn your workflow into a systematic engine of high-velocity development.

steps.title: Initialize Repository Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean workspace where Claude Code can track changes. This prevents the 'no version control' trap by ensuring every API update is atomic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a robust project structure for a Node.js API client, including .gitignore, a README, and a version-controlled config file.

steps.title: Define API Contract with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate type-safe interfaces based on your API documentation. This ensures your code doesn't break when external endpoints change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript interface and a service wrapper for the target API using the provided Swagger documentation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate API client from swagger.json'

steps.title: Automate Error Handling Logic
steps.description: Implement standard retry and error logging patterns. This protects your client's data and prevents silent failures during API calls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized error handling middleware for Axios that logs failures to a local file and implements exponential backoff.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --patch 'Implement retry logic in api-client.ts'

steps.title: Commit Workflow Automation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to automate descriptive commit messages, ensuring your history is readable for clients and future maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current changes and draft a conventional commit message that highlights the API integration improvements.

steps.title: Verify and Deploy
steps.description: Run automated smoke tests before every push to ensure your integration is stable and production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test suite that verifies API connectivity and logs the status of primary endpoints.

pro_tips: Always use environment variable injection for API keys to keep sensitive data out of your Git history.
Implement a 'dry-run' flag in your API service to test logic without hitting production endpoints.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation comments for every API method; it adds immense perceived value for your clients.
Tag your releases in Git after every successful client feature delivery to keep a clear history of milestones.
Configure a pre-commit hook that automatically runs your linting and type-checking to maintain code quality.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your API integration is stable, set up a CI/CD pipeline to automate deployments, further reducing your manual workload.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for manual file management. Gain the efficiency of a senior engineer and start delivering high-quality, version-controlled projects today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
